untranslatable_reason: Signal requires factor analysis to identify volume drivers (decomposing volume into causative factors like order flow, volatility regime shifts, news events, etc.) and matching those drivers to strategy dependencies. This requires a custom multi-factor decomposition model not available in the standard indicator library. The confidence thresholds (>65% primary driver, <25% secondary contribution) and minimum 30-sample analysis window are domain-specific statistical requirements that cannot be expressed with OHLCV indicators alone. A volume spike detector with vol_ratio_20 is provided as a partial proxy, but does not capture the core factor-matching logic.
translation_notes: This signal requires a stateful factor analysis engine to decompose volume sources and match them to strategy dependencies. The provided indicators capture only the volume spike detection (vol_ratio_20 > 0.65) and confidence thresholds (55-65%), but cannot encode the causal factor identification or strategy-dependency matching. Implementation would require custom preprocessing to label volume bars by their primary driver (institutional accumulation, retail panic, volatility expansion, etc.) before this rule can be operationalized in a standard backtest engine.
